mapper.insert: insert into ai_call_log(session_id, message_id, provider, model_name, request_summary, response_summary, status, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, latency_ms, error_message) values(#{sessionId}, #{messageId}, #{provider}, #{modelName}, #{requestSummary}, #{responseSummary}, #{status}, #{promptTokens}, #{completionTokens}, #{latencyMs}, #{errorMessage})
mapper.select: select * from ai_call_log where 1=1 and status=#{status} order by created_at desc, id desc
select * from ai_call_log where session_id=#{sessionId} order by created_at desc
